labels.analysis: The MCP Server "JobDoneBot" provides 106 tools for ai/ml tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "AI/ML Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: upscaler
tools.title: AI Image Upscaler
tools.description: AI super-resolution upscaling up to 4x. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: smart-resize
tools.title: Smart Resize
tools.description: Batch image resizing with AI subject detection and smart crop. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: bg-remover
tools.title: Background Remover
tools.description: One-click AI background removal for people, products, and objects. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pro-matting
tools.title: Pro Matting
tools.description: Professional-grade AI matting with fine hair-level edge detection. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: format-converter
tools.title: Format Converter
tools.description: Convert between 11 image formats including HEIC, WebP, PNG, JPG, AVIF.

tools.name: image-resizer
tools.title: Image Resizer
tools.description: Resize images to exact pixel dimensions with aspect ratio lock.

image.description: Base64-encoded image (PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, TIFF, GIF supported)

fit.description: Resize fit mode (contain=fit within, cover=fill & crop, fill=stretch)

tools.name: vector-viewer
tools.title: Vector Viewer
tools.description: Preview .ai/.eps files without Adobe Illustrator. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: image-crop
tools.title: Image Crop
tools.description: Drag-to-select cropping with preset aspect ratios. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: image-brightness
tools.title: Brightness Adjust
tools.description: AI auto-correction for dark or underexposed photos. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: image-collage
tools.title: Image Collage
tools.description: Combine multiple photos into a single image with layout templates. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: watermark
tools.title: Watermark
tools.description: Add text or logo watermarks to images in batch. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: exif-remover
tools.title: EXIF Remover
tools.description: Strip GPS location, camera info, and metadata from photos. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: panorama-splitter
tools.title: Panorama Splitter
tools.description: Split wide images into Instagram carousel slides. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: color-palette
tools.title: Color Palette
tools.description: Generate harmonious color palettes for design projects. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: id-photo-maker
tools.title: ID Photo Maker
tools.description: Create passport/ID photos without uploading to any server. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: image-color-picker
tools.title: 画像カラーピッカー
tools.description: 画像から色を瞬時に特定。スポイト+自動パレット抽出 (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-join
tools.title: PDF Merge
tools.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one with drag-to-reorder.

pdfs.description: Array of base64-encoded PDF files to merge (order preserved)

tools.name: pdf-split
tools.title: PDF Split
tools.description: Split PDFs by page range or into individual pages.

splitMode.description: Split mode: each=per page, range=specific pages, even-odd=split by parity

tools.name: pdf-compress
tools.title: PDF Compress
tools.description: Reduce PDF file size for email attachments. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-to-image
tools.title: PDF to Image
tools.description: Convert PDF pages to high-quality PNG, JPEG, or WebP. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: image-to-pdf
tools.title: Image to PDF
tools.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF document. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-rotate
tools.title: PDF Rotate
tools.description: Rotate PDF pages by 90/180/270 degrees. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-unlock
tools.title: PDF Unlock
tools.description: Remove edit/print/copy restrictions from PDFs. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-redact
tools.title: PDF Redact
tools.description: Black out sensitive text in PDFs without server processing. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-metadata-remover
tools.title: PDF Metadata Remover
tools.description: Strip author, edit history, and metadata before sharing. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-sign
tools.title: PDF Sign
tools.description: Add handwritten or text signatures directly to PDFs. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-password
tools.title: PDF Password
tools.description: Encrypt PDFs with password protection. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: invoice-generator
tools.title: Invoice Generator
tools.description: Japan qualified invoice compliant. PDF output in 3 seconds. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: quote-generator
tools.title: Quote Generator
tools.description: Create quotes with auto tax calculation and PDF export. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: delivery-note-generator
tools.title: Delivery Note
tools.description: Generate delivery notes with receipt confirmation field. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: receipt-generator
tools.title: Receipt Generator
tools.description: Invoice-compliant receipts with auto tax calculation. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: expense-report
tools.title: Expense Report
tools.description: Category-based expense reports with PDF output. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: purchase-order
tools.title: Purchase Order
tools.description: Purchase orders with delivery terms and tax calculation. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: payslip-generator
tools.title: Payslip Generator
tools.description: Payslips with auto social insurance calculation. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: pdf-stamper
tools.title: Digital Stamp
tools.description: Apply Japanese hanko stamps to PDF documents. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: stamp-maker
tools.title: Stamp Maker
tools.description: Create digital hanko seals (personal, corporate, date stamps). (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: nda-generator
tools.title: NDA Generator
tools.description: Generate NDAs based on Japan METI templates in 30 seconds. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: terms-generator
tools.title: Terms Generator
tools.description: Create terms of service and privacy policies from questionnaire. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: contract-generator
tools.title: Contract Generator
tools.description: Generate business contracts from templates. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: withholding-tax-calc
tools.title: Withholding Tax Calc
tools.description: Auto 10.21%/20.42% rate selection with reverse calculation.

tools.name: mercari-calculator
tools.title: Mercari Profit Calc
tools.description: Calculate net profit after 10% fee and shipping costs.

tools.name: shipping-calculator
tools.title: Shipping Calculator
tools.description: Compare rates across Yamato, Yu-Pack, and Sagawa. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: journal-entry
tools.title: Journal Entry
tools.description: Create debit/credit journal entries with PDF export. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: trial-balance
tools.title: Trial Balance
tools.description: Generate trial balance sheets from account balances. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: profit-loss
tools.title: Profit & Loss
tools.description: Auto-generate P&L statements from revenue and expense data. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: balance-sheet
tools.title: Balance Sheet
tools.description: Create B/S from assets, liabilities, and equity. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: cash-flow-statement
tools.title: Cash Flow Statement
tools.description: Indirect method cash flow statement generation. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: ar-ap-manager
tools.title: AR/AP Manager
tools.description: Accounts receivable/payable tracking with aging analysis. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: chart-of-accounts
tools.title: Chart of Accounts
tools.description: 100+ standard accounts with search and custom additions. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: npv-irr-calc
tools.title: NPV/IRR Calculator
tools.description: Net present value and internal rate of return calculation.

amount.description: Cash flow amount in JPY (negative for outflow)

cashFlows.description: Cash flow entries (year 0 should be negative for initial investment)

tools.name: bond-yield-calc
tools.title: Bond Yield Calc
tools.description: Yield to maturity, duration, and convexity calculator.

tools.name: investment-simulator
tools.title: Investment Simulator
tools.description: NISA/iDeCo compound growth simulation.

initialLumpSum.description: Initial lump sum investment in JPY

tools.name: depreciation-calc
tools.title: Depreciation Calc
tools.description: Straight-line and declining-balance depreciation schedules.

tools.name: tax-return-calc
tools.title: Tax Return Calc
tools.description: Japan income tax and resident tax with progressive rates.

employmentRevenue.description: Employment revenue (給与収入) in JPY

businessRevenue.description: Business revenue (事業収入) in JPY

businessExpenses.description: Business expenses (事業経費) in JPY

donations.description: Donations (ふるさと納税等) in JPY

tools.name: year-end-adj-calc
tools.title: Year-End Adjustment
tools.description: Calculate refund or additional tax owed.

tools.name: social-insurance-calc
tools.title: Social Insurance Calc
tools.description: Health, pension, and employment insurance from standard monthly income.

tools.name: resume-generator
tools.title: Resume Generator
tools.description: JIS-standard Japanese resume (rirekisho) with PDF export. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: career-history-generator
tools.title: Career History
tools.description: Professional CV in 3 format styles. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: take-home-pay-calc
tools.title: Take-Home Pay Calc
tools.description: Net salary from gross with full tax and insurance breakdown.

tools.name: resignation-generator
tools.title: Resignation Letter
tools.description: Proper-format resignation letters in 30 seconds. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: recruitment-fee-calc
tools.title: Recruitment Fee Calc
tools.description: Staffing agency fee, refund terms, and KPI back-calculation.

tools.name: furigana-adder
tools.title: Furigana Adder
tools.description: Auto-add reading aids to kanji by grade level. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: seating-chart
tools.title: Seating Chart
tools.description: Random seating with constraints. Printable PDF. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: grade-calculator
tools.title: Grade Calculator
tools.description: Convert 3-aspect evaluations to ABC and 5-level grades.

knowledgeScore.description: Knowledge & Skills score (知識・技能の得点)

thinkingScore.description: Thinking & Expression score (思考・判断・表現の得点)

attitudeScore.description: Attitude score (主体的態度の得点)

tools.name: classroom-timer
tools.title: Classroom Timer
tools.description: Full-screen countdown timer with chime sounds. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: certificate-maker
tools.title: Certificate Maker
tools.description: Award certificates with templates and name mail-merge. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: json-expert
tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Format, validate, minify JSON with tree view.

json.description: JSON string to format, validate, or minify

tools.name: base64-converter
tools.title: Base64 Converter
tools.description: Encode/decode text and files to Base64.

tools.name: regex-tester
tools.title: Regex Tester
tools.description: Real-time regex testing and debugging.

testString.description: String to test against the pattern

flags.description: Regex flags (g, i, m, s, u, y)

tools.name: uuid-generator
tools.title: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate random UUIDs instantly.

tools.name: hash-generator
tools.title: Hash Generator
tools.description: Compute MD5, SHA-256, and other hash values.

tools.name: jwt-decoder
tools.title: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode and inspect JWT token contents.

tools.name: cron-generator
tools.title: Cron Generator
tools.description: Build and parse cron expressions visually.

expression.description: Cron expression (5-field format: minute hour day month weekday)

mode.description: Parse existing expression or generate description

tools.name: url-encoder
tools.title: URL Encoder
tools.description: URL encode/decode with parameter parsing.

tools.name: diff-checker
tools.title: Diff Checker
tools.description: Side-by-side text and code diff comparison.

format.description: Output format (unified=git-style diff, json=structured, stats=summary only)

tools.name: sql-formatter
tools.title: SQL Formatter
tools.description: Format and beautify SQL queries.

tools.name: yaml-json
tools.title: YAML-JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert between YAML and JSON formats.

input.description: YAML or JSON string to convert

tools.name: timestamp-converter
tools.title: Timestamp Converter
tools.description: Convert Unix timestamps to/from human-readable dates.

tools.name: csv-excel-converter
tools.title: CSV-Excel Converter
tools.description: Convert between CSV and Excel (.xlsx) in the browser.

tools.name: password-generator
tools.title: パスワード生成
tools.description: 安全なパスワードを即座に生成。長さ・文字種をカスタマイズ

tools.name: color-converter
tools.title: カラー変換
tools.description: HEX・RGB・HSL・CMYKを相互変換。カラーピッカー付き

tools.name: unit-converter
tools.title: 単位変換
tools.description: 長さ・重さ・温度・面積・容量など主要単位を即変換

fromUnit.description: Source unit (e.g. km, lb, c, gb)

toUnit.description: Target unit (e.g. mi, kg, f, mb)

tools.name: timezone-converter
tools.title: タイムゾーン変換
tools.description: 世界の主要都市の時差を即計算。サマータイム自動対応

tools.name: markdown-editor
tools.title: Markdownエディタ
tools.description: リアルタイムプレビュー付きMarkdownエディタ。GFM対応 (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: markdown-to-html
tools.title: Markdown-HTML Converter
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and HTML formats.

input.description: Markdown or HTML string to convert

tools.name: html-sanitizer
tools.title: HTML Sanitizer
tools.description: Sanitize HTML removing dangerous tags and attributes.

tools.name: json-schema-validator
tools.title: JSON Schema Validator
tools.description: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema.

tools.name: xml-json-converter
tools.title: XML-JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert between XML and JSON formats.

input.description: XML or JSON string to convert

tools.name: math-evaluator
tools.title: Math Evaluator
tools.description: Evaluate mathematical expressions with variables and functions.

tools.name: date-calculator
tools.title: Date Calculator
tools.description: Calculate date differences, add/subtract dates, count business days.

tools.name: string-transform
tools.title: String Transform
tools.description: Transform strings between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, slug, etc.

tools.name: data-faker
tools.title: Data Faker
tools.description: Generate realistic fake data (names, emails, addresses) in JSON/CSV.

tools.name: csv-query
tools.title: CSV Query
tools.description: Run SQL-like queries on CSV data.

query.description: SQL-like query (e.g. "SELECT name, age WHERE age > 30 ORDER BY name LIMIT 10")

tools.name: qr-designer
tools.title: QR Code Designer
tools.description: Create styled QR codes with custom logos and colors. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: utm-builder
tools.title: UTM Builder
tools.description: Build and parse campaign tracking URLs.

tools.name: og-preview
tools.title: OG Image Preview
tools.description: Preview how links appear when shared on social media. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: barcode-generator
tools.title: Barcode Generator
tools.description: Generate JAN, EAN, Code128 barcodes. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: video-optimizer
tools.title: Video Optimizer
tools.description: Optimize videos for Instagram Reels and Stories. (Browser-based tool)

tools.name: word-counter
tools.title: Word Counter
tools.description: Count characters, words, and estimate reading time.

tools.name: text-statistics
tools.title: Text Statistics
tools.description: Analyze text for readability, vocabulary richness, and keyword extraction.

tools.name: code-formatter
tools.title: Code Formatter
tools.description: Format source code using Prettier. Supports JS, TS, CSS, HTML, JSON, YAML, Markdown, GraphQL.

tools.name: json-to-typescript
tools.title: JSON to TypeScript
tools.description: Infer TypeScript interface definitions from JSON samples.

json.description: JSON sample to infer TypeScript types from

tools.name: http-probe
tools.title: HTTP Probe
tools.description: Probe a URL and return status code, headers, response time, and redirect info.

method.description: HTTP method (HEAD is faster, GET gets body info)

tools.name: json-to-csv
tools.title: JSON to CSV
tools.description: Convert JSON arrays of objects to CSV format.

json.description: JSON array of objects to convert to CSV

tools.name: subscribe-pro
tools.title: Subscribe to JobDoneBot Pro
tools.description: Create a checkout session for JobDoneBot Pro (500 JPY/month). Available plans: JobDoneBot Pro (500 JPY/month), JobDoneBot Team (2980 JPY/month). Returns a Stripe checkout URL.

tools.name: check-subscription
tools.title: Check Subscription Status
tools.description: Check the status of a JobDoneBot checkout session.
